feedback.text: Please consider protecting Video Games from being destroyed. Games must not be destroyed because they are a vital part of our cultural history, creativity, and shared experiences. Like books and films, games reflect the ideas, values, and emotions of their time. Preserving them ensures future generations can study, enjoy, and learn from them. I want EU law to protect my video games purchases. More info on the issue: https://www.stopkillinggames.com/faq
